description: This file contains unit tests for CSV utility functions such as toCsvString and downloadTextFile, verifying CSV formatting, escaping, and file download behavior.

methods.name: toCsvString
methods.description: Generates a CSV string from headers and rows with proper escaping and CRLF line endings.

methods.name: downloadTextFile
methods.description: Creates and triggers a download for a text file with specified filename and content.
